HGSS.029.0000:
Hello, just when you least expect it!
I am Cameron the Photographer.\f
You look so photogenic!
Why not have a picture taken? [0200,0000]
HGSS.029.0001:
All right, then!
Get yourselves ready!\f
HGSS.029.0002:
Good, good!
We’ve got a nice picture!\f
You can see all the pictures
on your PC.
HGSS.029.0003:
Wait a second!\f
My superhuman ability is telling me
that your Photo Album\r
is full!\f
Sorry to trouble you, but
can you delete some pictures\r
before you talk to me again?
HGSS.029.0004:
Hmmm...
You don’t seem to have a Photo Album.\f
For you to sort pictures taken,
you will need one.\f
My big brother runs a memorial photo
studio at Goldenrod City.\r
Why don’t you go there to get one?
HGSS.029.0006:
There is an automatic camera.\f
Do you want to take a picture? [0200,0000]
HGSS.029.0007: It will proceed to take a picture.\f
HGSS.029.0008: It has taken a picture successfully.
HGSS.029.0009:
The Photo Album is full.\f
Please delete some pictures before you
come back.
HGSS.029.0010:
You don’t have a Photo Album.\f
Please go to Goldenrod City.
There is a tunnel there...\r
And come back with a Photo Album.
